questions.q: Which statement about the Pixel and CAPI is CORRECT?
options: They are complementary: using both gives maximum coverage
The Pixel is only used on mobile
questions.explanation: Pixel (browser) + CAPI (server-side) = ~95% coverage vs ~70% with Pixel only.

questions.q: Which type of events does NOT support Custom Conversions?
questions.explanation: Custom Conversions only apply to web and offline events. For app you have to create direct Custom Events.
AEM responds to Apple's ATT (App Tracking Transparency) framework on iOS 14+.

options: Facebook SDK or an authorized MMP
questions.explanation: Apps need the FB SDK installed or an MMP (AppsFlyer, Adjust, etc.).

questions.q: You want to measure purchases of a specific product (Purchase where URL contains '/premium' AND value greater than 1000). What do you use?
options: A new Custom Event called PremiumPurchase
A Custom Conversion with rules on the existing Purchase
A new Pixel just for premium
questions.explanation: Custom Conversion = a rule on an existing event with no code required. A Custom Event would force you to touch the Pixel code.
